comment: Maps each Risk Baseline project to its TRITON component, per Confluence 'QA Risk Baseline 2026' §4.6. excludeKeywords filter out service requests by summary (reviewed start of each quarter). NOTE: Mira and Mira Studio both share the TRITON component 'Mira'; the doc disambiguates by linked issue project (HZN-* -> Mira Studio, MIRA-* -> Mira). This is not yet automated here (see linkAttribution).
